race.comment: Very moderate maiden with many making up the numbers. With the scratching of SAHHA SWEETIE MOUSSAKA (4) gets chance. Has been racing over the border and over much further. Not ideal coming back in journey but has the figures to be swamping a moderate field late. TASSORO (6) wasn't beaten far fresh and strips fitter. Has the claim and worth following up. GOSSIPING BABUSHKA (11) was huge odds but only a few lengths away last time and a repeat would see her run well. ME NAME'S BORIS (3) has ability but is mixing form. Safely held latest but rates highly on the start prior. Coming well back in trip, blinkers on and has the claim. Can improve sharply.
